/usr/bin/ar qc libimage_processor_lib.a CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/app/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/app/CommandLineParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/app/FilterFactory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/app/HelpPrinter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/core/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/io/BmpIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/PointwiseFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/MatrixFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/CropFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/GrayscaleFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/NegativeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/SharpeningFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/EdgeDetectionFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/GaussianBlurFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/image_processor_lib.dir/src/filters/ArtisticLensFilter.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libimage_processor_lib.a
